user_prompt: Generate cookie consent banner copy that complies with both GDPR and ePrivacy.
actual_output:
# GDPR & ePrivacy-Compliant Cookie Consent Banner

## Banner Copy (Primary Consent Layer)

---

### **Headline**
"We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience"

### **Body Text**
We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:
- **Essential:** Keep our site secure and functional
- **Analytics:** Understand how you use our site to improve it
- **Marketing:** Show you relevant content and measure campaign effectiveness

Under GDPR and ePrivacy regulations, we need your consent before placing non-essential cookies on your device.

### **Button Options**
- **"Accept All"** (primary action)
- **"Reject Non-Essential"** (secondary action)
- **"Customize"** (tertiary action — links to detailed preferences)

---

## Detailed Preferences Panel (Linked from "Customize")

### **Cookie Categories with Toggle Controls**

**1. Essential Cookies** ✓ *[Always ON — non-toggleable]*
- Purpose: Security, fraud prevention, session management
- Legal basis: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) / Technical necessity
- Examples: Session ID, CSRF tokens, security flags
- Retention: Until session ends or 12 months

**2. Analytics Cookies** ☐ *[User toggleable]*
- Purpose: Measure site traffic, user behavior, feature usage
- Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a))
- Tools: Google Analytics, Hotjar, Mixpanel [*list your actual tools*]
- Retention: 13 months
- Third parties: [List processor names and links to their privacy policies]

**3. Marketing & Advertising Cookies** ☐ *[User toggleable]*
- Purpose: Retargeting, personalized ads, campaign measurement
- Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a))
- Tools: Facebook Pixel, Google Ads, LinkedIn Insight Tag [*list your actual tools*]
- Retention: 12 months
- Third parties: [List processor names and links to their privacy policies]

**4. Functional/Preference Cookies** ☐ *[User toggleable]*
- Purpose: Remember user preferences (language, theme, saved items)
- Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a))
- Retention: 12 months

---

## Privacy Notice Integration (Required by Art. 13/14)

### **Link Text**
"View our full [Privacy Policy](#privacy-policy) and [Cookie Policy](#cookie-policy)"

### **Minimum Disclosures in Linked Policy**

**For each cookie category, document:**

| Element | Required Content |
|---------|------------------|
| **Data Controller** | Your organization name and contact details |
| **Lawful Basis** | Art. 6(1)(a) consent, Art. 6(1)(f) legitimate interest, or technical necessity |
| **Data Processors** | Third-party tool names (Google, Facebook, etc.) with links to their privacy policies |
| **Retention Period** | How long cookies persist (e.g., "13 months from last activity") |
| **Rights** | Right to withdraw consent, access, deletion, lodge complaint with supervisory authority |
| **DPO Contact** | If applicable, DPO email or contact method |
| **Supervisory Authority** | Link to relevant EU data protection authority |

---

## Compliance Checklist

### **GDPR Requirements (Art. 6, 7, 13)**

- [ ] **Granular consent:** Separate toggles for each non-essential category (not one "accept all" checkbox)
- [ ] **Affirmative action:** Consent requires active opt-in, not pre-checked boxes
- [ ] **Easy withdrawal:** Users can withdraw consent as easily as they gave it
- [ ] **Lawful basis documented:** Each processing activity has a documented basis (consent, legitimate interest, etc.)
- [ ] **Transparency:** Clear language explaining *what* is collected and *why*
- [ ] **Linked privacy notice:** Full Art. 13/14 disclosures accessible from banner

### **ePrivacy Directive Requirements**

- [ ] **Prior consent for non-essential cookies:** Analytics, marketing, and functional cookies require consent *before* placement
- [ ] **Essential cookies exempt:** Only truly essential cookies (security, session management) can be placed without consent
- [ ] **Cookie identifier:** Clearly identify which cookies are placed by which tools
- [ ] **Third-party disclosure:** Disclose when cookies are set by third parties (e.g., "Google Analytics sets cookies on your device")

### **UX Best Practices**

- [ ] **Reject button equally prominent:** "Reject Non-Essential" button same size/color as "Accept All"
- [ ] **No dark patterns:** Don't use confusing language, buried reject buttons, or auto-scrolling to hide options
- [ ] **Mobile-friendly:** Banner readable and functional on mobile devices
- [ ] **Persistent consent record:** Store user choice with timestamp for audit purposes

---

## Template: Cookie Policy Section

```
## Our Cookie Policy

### What are cookies?
Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. 
They help us recognize you, remember your preferences, and measure how you use our site.

### Types of cookies we use:

**Essential Cookies** (no consent required)
- Session cookies that keep you logged in
- Security cookies that prevent fraud
- These are necessary for our site to function

**Analytics Cookies** (consent required)
We use [Google Analytics / Mixpanel / other tool] to understand how visitors 
use our site. This helps us improve features and user experience.
- Data controller: [Your company]
- Data processor: [Tool provider name]
- Retention: 13 months
- [Link to processor's privacy policy]

**Marketing Cookies** (consent required)
We use [Facebook Pixel / Google Ads / other tool] to show you relevant ads 
and measure campaign performance.
- Data controller: [Your company]
- Data processor: [Tool provider name]
- Retention: 12 months
- [Link to processor's privacy policy]

### Your rights
You can:
- Change your cookie preferences at any time via [link to preferences center]
- Withdraw consent without penalty
- Request access to or deletion of your data
- Lodge a complaint with [your supervisory authority]

### Contact us
[DPO email or privacy contact]
```

---

## Critical Compliance Notes

⚠️ **Do NOT:**
- Pre-check non-essential cookie boxes
- Use confusing language like "Allow cookies to improve your experience" (vague)
- Hide the reject button or make it smaller than accept
- Auto-play videos or load tracking pixels before consent
- Use "legitimate interest" as the basis for analytics/marketing cookies (consent is required under ePrivacy)

✅ **Do:**
- Obtain fresh consent if you add new cookies or change purposes
- Document consent records (timestamp, user choice, IP address) for 3+ years
- Execute Data Processing Agreements (Art. 28) with all cookie tool providers
- Review and update your cookie list quarterly

---

## Legal Disclaimer

This template is compliance guidance based on GDPR (EU 2016/679) and the ePrivacy Directive (2002/58/EC). Supervisory authority guidance varies by jurisdiction (e.g., EDPB Guidelines 05/2020 on consent, national DPA decisions). **Consult qualified legal counsel** to confirm this banner meets requirements in your specific jurisdictions and use cases.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully addressed the user's request by providing comprehensive cookie banner copy, category descriptions, and a compliance checklist aligned with its persona.
